titlestmt.titleproper: Health Association of Cattaraugus County records2890
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-06-27 00:06:33 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Health Association of Cattaraugus County records
did.abstract: Includes histories of the Health Association of Cattaraugus County, Board of Directors and Executive Committee minutes, scrapbooks of Association activities, and correspondence.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes histories of the Health Association of Cattaraugus County, 1908-1960, Board of Directors and Executive Committee minutes, 1931-1948, scrapbooks of Association activities, and correspondence.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Health Association of Cattaraugus County. Records, #2890. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Health planning -- New York (State) -- Cattaraugus County.
Health.

did.unittitle: Series I. Minutes, reports, publications, photos, correspondence
Board of Directors and Executive Committee Minutes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: For the Health Association of Cattaraugus County in ring binders

did.unittitle: Minutes of its Allegany, NY health committee
Anti-tuberculosis Activity in Cattaraugus County prior to Milbank Demonstration.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: typed by Florence Bradley

did.unittitle: Report of Study of Program, Organization and administration of HA of CC Inc. and CC Heart Chapter

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: By State TB Committee, NY Heart Assembly, State Charities Aid Assn. (SCAA) F. Palmer, exec. B.Eaton, Prog. Asst.

did.unittitle: Sample appendices for report in file # 3
Sale of Bartlett House to County
Correspondence re: giving up Bartlett House

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: includes letters to and from and signed by Nancy Batlett Laughlin

did.unittitle: Bartlett House re: insurance and repairs
Bartlett House: paint, boiler, fire extinguisher

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Recommended by fire chief. Key sample, policies re: maintenance, etc.

did.unittitle: Financial statements re: Bartlett Memorial Community Center
Bartlett House re: rents, parking in drive, need for more room, use of rooms, etc.
Press service (Anti-Tuberculosis) of State Charities Aid Ass'n.
Reports and important information about early years.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Establishment of Olean City Health Dept. office. Florence Bradley, Secretary and Registrar of Vital Statistics, Dr. J.C. Clark City Health Officer.

did.unittitle: Bon Air was three tents in PA.
Annual TB cases reported went from 5 to 32.
Olean branch of SCAA with Wm. H. Mandeville, President.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Eve Moon, Secretary

did.unittitle: Lilla Wheeler a vital force in CC Health demonstration.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mrs Greenleaf, President; Allan B. Williams, secretary; Verna Hoaglund, Exec. Secretary.

did.unittitle: Booklets and other official publications about the demonstration in Cattaraugus County

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: By George Nelbach of State Charities Aid Ass'n.

did.unittitle: Re: an American Dietetic Ass'n exhibit used by CCTB and PH
Closing of Rocky Crest Sanitorium in 1950

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: RCS had started in 1916, but 1946 State Law reduced State Aid to counties.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Merge with file # 27

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: C.S. luncheon program with songs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1926 memo from George Nelbach

did.unittitle: Two copies of the original program for luncheon at Bartlett Memorial Community Center

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: At which time Nancy Bartlett Laughlin presented the property to the Health Association. Also includes a two page typed list of all attendees. (Very Important)

did.unittitle: Cattaraugus County Health Camp Inventories; report, including staff names
Cattaraugus County Health Camp Reports and Menu
Cattaraugus County Health Camp Reports and Menu
Cattaraugus County Health Camp and Miscellaneous Reports

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Names of Children; registration figures

did.unittitle: Photos of volunteers at exhibits, folding and stuffing Christmas Seal mail, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Some are of teenage girls.

did.unittitle: No file with this number, but it is probably the oversize photo of Dr. Greenleaf.
Photo of Wheeler Memorial cottage at Trudeau Sanatorium in Saranac

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also, color print of portrait of Dr. Trudeau (probably cut from magazine - damaged)

did.unittitle: Contain important information about the early years. Several unnumbered files contain original reports typed by Florence Bradley and by Ella Finch.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: More information about this period and official publications about it will be found in files in Box 3. These have scotch tape damage.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In 1956, complaints about phone service - dial system to be introduced; activities of the group including visits to patients at Gowanda Mental Hospital

did.unittitle: Allegany Health Committee Antidotes for poison

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Health Association withdraws its support

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Its start and correspondence with Anna Hooley of Allegany

did.unittitle: George Nelbach says we need TB hospital here

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Should be in with rest of hers?

did.unittitle: Health Education Project in Cattaraugus County

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports to Milbank Fund

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All are related in some way with the Milbank Health Demonstration in Cattaraugus County; other publications deal with underweight school children of Olean, Rocky Crest Sanitorium annual reports, Open Air Crusades, rebuilding crippled children, school health education in the county, finding TB cases, etc.

did.unittitle: Report regarding health demonstration in Syracuse

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Achronological report of the two demonstrations

did.unittitle: An article on "the individuality of the child versus the system" by Kingsley

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A large ledger with gray fabric cover and leather corners probably put together by Florence Bradley

did.unittitle: Contains four scrapbooks: Maroon leather with "Scrapbook" in gold

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Standard B&P Scrapbook" compiled by Florence Bradley
